title: dalea lumholtzii
intro: Dalea lumholtzii, also known as the Red Stemmed Prairie Clover, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is traditionally used as a medicinal plant, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Dalea lumholtzii are believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Dalea lumholtzii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in the form of salves and poultices.
